Ten reviewed examples

    Step 1

    Fix the broken primitive type

    Loading reviewed prompt...

    Primitive annotations Warm-up

    Step guidance

    Goal

    Make the type annotation match the numeric value.

    Hint

    Only one token is wrong on the first line.

    Why it matters

    Type annotations should describe the value you already have.

    Reviewed snippet

    Editable current step

    Step feedback

    Start with: Make the type annotation match the numeric value. Hint: Only one token is wrong on the first line.

    How Lantern grades this

    • The next example stays locked until the current fix matches the reviewed solution.
    • The browser grader scores one reviewed spec file per step.
    • The app never executes arbitrary learner TypeScript.
